connections.when: Dashboards use visualization charts as panel content
connections.yields: data-visualization chart components for dashboard panels

connections.when: Analysis provides KPIs, segments, and insights that populate dashboard panels
connections.yields: data-analysis KPI definitions and segment insights

UI/UX accessibility and layout principles apply to dashboard design

connections.when: Chart interpretation validates whether dashboard panels tell their intended story
Executive dashboards support C-suite storytelling with data-backed KPIs
